item.title: Project Update: AnalysisToolbox
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Recent activity in AnalysisToolbox:

Recent Commits

  • 8c8edb2 fix: clean up stale git state after timed-out operations in finalize workflows
  • 01132a6 refactor: streamline function parameters and improve output handling across mult
  • 854237c Add condition profile processor and log to parquet utility
  • f276def fix: update OLS processor to handle folder input and improve logging; refactor p
  • 5b22587 Refactor logging in workflow_wrapper.nf to use project-specific log file; add cr

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

View on GitHub → | See all projects →
